requirement_topic.en: EU Authorised Representative / Importer — Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 + Bulgarian Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟授权代表/进口商 — 法规（EU）2019/1020 + 保加利亚语标签
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟授權代表/進口商 — 法規（EU）2019/1020 + 保加利亞語標籤

summary.en: Under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 (Market Surveillance Regulation), Article 4, non-EU manufacturers must have either: (a) an importer established in the EU who takes on responsibility for the product, or (b) an EU Authorised Representative (EU AR) appointed by the manufacturer before the first product enters any EU market, including Bulgaria. The EU AR must be established in an EU member state (Bulgaria qualifies, but any EU member state suffices). The EU AR's name and postal address must appear on the product itself, its packaging, or its accompanying documentation in a visible and legible way. The same requirement applies when the product is sold through online platforms into Bulgaria. An EU AR is responsible for holding the DoC and technical documentation, cooperating with CRC, and ensuring corrective action if the product is non-compliant. Bulgarian-language product labelling is a national requirement for products placed on the Bulgarian market: the product name, model identifier, manufacturer name and address, EU AR name and address, and any safety warnings must be provided in Bulgarian (Cyrillic script). DAMTN enforces labelling and general product safety requirements; CRC enforces the EU AR documentation obligation under RED.
summary.zh: 依据法规（EU）2019/1020（市场监督法规）第4条，非欧盟制造商须具备以下条件之一：（a）在欧盟境内设立的进口商，对产品承担责任；或（b）在首批产品进入任何欧盟市场（包括保加利亚）之前，由制造商委任的欧盟授权代表（EU AR）。EU AR须在欧盟成员国境内设立（保加利亚符合资格，但任何欧盟成员国均可）。EU AR的名称和通讯地址须以醒目且清晰的方式印于产品本体、包装或随附文件上。通过网络平台向保加利亚销售的产品同样适用上述要求。EU AR负责保存合格声明和技术文件，与CRC配合，并在产品不合规时确保采取纠正措施。对于投放保加利亚市场的产品，保加利亚语产品标签是国家要求：产品名称、型号标识、制造商名称和地址、EU AR名称和地址以及任何安全警告须以保加利亚语（西里尔字母）提供。DAMTN执行标签和一般产品安全要求；CRC在RED下执行EU AR文件义务。
summary.zht: 依據法規（EU）2019/1020（市場監督法規）第4條，非歐盟製造商須具備以下條件之一：（a）在歐盟境內設立的進口商，對產品承擔責任；或（b）在首批產品進入任何歐盟市場（包括保加利亞）之前，由製造商委任的歐盟授權代表（EU AR）。EU AR須在歐盟成員國境內設立（保加利亞符合資格，但任何歐盟成員國均可）。EU AR的名稱和通訊地址須以醒目且清晰的方式印於產品本體、包裝或隨附文件上。透過網絡平台向保加利亞銷售的產品同樣適用上述要求。EU AR負責保存合格聲明和技術文件，與CRC配合，並在產品不合規時確保採取糾正措施。對於投放保加利亞市場的產品，保加利亞語產品標籤是國家要求：產品名稱、型號標識、製造商名稱和地址、EU AR名稱和地址以及任何安全警告須以保加利亞語（西里爾字母）提供。DAMTN執行標籤和一般產品安全要求；CRC在RED下執行EU AR文件義務。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 4 — EU Authorised Representative obligation for non-EU manufacturers
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 10 — manufacturer obligations including DoC and technical file retention
Bulgarian Consumer Protection Act (Закон за защита на потребителите) — consumer protection, including Bulgarian-language labelling obligation
EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR) (EU) 2023/988 — applies from 13 December 2024 for consumer products

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent to the EU Authorised Representative obligation. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Bulgaria do not need to appoint any representative within China for EU regulatory purposes; however, they must appoint an EU-established entity (EU AR or importer) before the product enters any EU member state market. China's domestic market requires the manufacturer's Chinese address to appear on product packaging, but there is no obligation for a third-country representative structure analogous to the EU AR. Chinese CCC certificates list the manufacturer's Chinese address; this does not satisfy the EU requirement for an EU-based contact point.
summary.zh: 中国没有与欧盟授权代表义务直接对应的监管要求。中国制造商出口到保加利亚时，无需为欧盟监管目的在中国境内委任代表；但须在产品进入任何欧盟成员国市场之前，委任欧盟境内实体（EU AR或进口商）。中国国内市场要求制造商中国地址印于产品包装上，但没有类似欧盟AR结构的第三国代表义务。中国CCC证书列明制造商中国地址，不满足欧盟对欧盟境内联系点的要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與歐盟授權代表義務直接對應的監管要求。中國製造商出口到保加利亞時，無需為歐盟監管目的在中國境內委任代表；但須在產品進入任何歐盟成員國市場之前，委任歐盟境內實體（EU AR或進口商）。中國國內市場要求製造商中國地址印於產品包裝上，但沒有類似歐盟AR結構的第三國代表義務。中國CCC證書列明製造商中國地址，不滿足歐盟對歐盟境內聯繫點的要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification; lists manufacturer's Chinese address but has no EU AR equivalent
GB 191-2008 / SJ/T 11364-2014 — Chinese product labelling standards (Chinese language only)

gap.en: Structural gaps with no Chinese equivalent: (1) EU Authorised Representative — Chinese manufacturers without an EU importer must appoint an EU-established AR before first placement in Bulgaria or any EU market; failure renders the product non-compliant and prevents lawful customs clearance; (2) Bulgarian-language (Cyrillic) labelling — product labelling (name, model, manufacturer/EU AR contact, safety warnings, supply voltage) must include Bulgarian in Cyrillic script; English-only or Chinese-only labels are not acceptable for Bulgarian market placement; (3) DoC retention — the signed EU Declaration of Conformity must be retained for 10 years and be available to CRC on request; (4) WEEE registration — WEEE compliance scheme registration with ECOBULPACK or ELITEX (Bulgarian producer compliance organisations) is required before market placement of EEE; (5) Online platform sales — sales via e-commerce platforms into Bulgaria are subject to the same EU AR and CE marking obligations; platforms are increasingly responsible for verifying compliance under GPSR and the Digital Services Act. Manufacturers should engage an EU AR service provider and ensure Bulgarian Cyrillic translations of labelling and instructions before first shipment.
gap.zh: 无中国等效项的结构性差距：（1）欧盟授权代表——没有欧盟进口商的中国制造商须在首次向保加利亚或任何欧盟市场放置产品之前委任欧盟境内AR；缺失将导致产品不合规，并阻止合法清关；（2）保加利亚语（西里尔字母）标签——产品标签（名称、型号、制造商/EU AR联系方式、安全警告、供电电压）须以西里尔字母标注保加利亚语；仅英语或仅中文标签不可用于保加利亚市场放置；（3）合格声明保存——签署的欧盟合格声明须保存10年，并在CRC要求时提供；（4）WEEE注册——在向保加利亚市场放置EEE前，须向保加利亚生产者合规组织（ECOBULPACK或ELITEX）完成WEEE合规计划注册；（5）网络平台销售——通过电子商务平台向保加利亚销售受相同EU AR和CE标志义务约束；依据GPSR和《数字服务法》，平台越来越多地承担核实合规的责任。制造商应在首次发货前聘请EU AR服务提供商，并确保标签和说明书的保加利亚语西里尔字母翻译。
gap.zht: 無中國等效項的結構性差距：（1）歐盟授權代表——沒有歐盟進口商的中國製造商須在首次向保加利亞或任何歐盟市場放置產品之前委任歐盟境內AR；缺失將導致產品不合規，並阻止合法清關；（2）保加利亞語（西里爾字母）標籤——產品標籤（名稱、型號、製造商/EU AR聯繫方式、安全警告、供電電壓）須以西里爾字母標注保加利亞語；僅英語或僅中文標籤不可用於保加利亞市場放置；（3）合格聲明保存——簽署的歐盟合格聲明須保存10年，並在CRC要求時提供；（4）WEEE登記——在向保加利亞市場放置EEE前，須向保加利亞生產者合規組織（ECOBULPACK或ELITEX）完成WEEE合規計劃登記；（5）網絡平台銷售——通過電子商務平台向保加利亞銷售受相同EU AR和CE標誌義務約束；依據GPSR和《數字服務法》，平台越來越多地承擔核實合規的責任。製造商應在首次發貨前聘請EU AR服務提供商，並確保標籤和說明書的保加利亞語西里爾字母翻譯。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU AR or EU importer required before first placement in Bulgaria; Bulgarian-language (Cyrillic) labelling mandatory under Bulgarian consumer protection law; DoC retention 10 years (RED Art. 10); WEEE registration with ECOBULPACK or ELITEX required
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — CCC lists Chinese manufacturer address; no third-country AR structure required for Chinese domestic market

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An EU Authorised Representative is a hard legal prerequisite for Chinese manufacturers without an EU importer selling wireless devices in Bulgaria. Bulgarian-language (Cyrillic) labelling is a national mandatory requirement beyond the EU-wide CE marking obligation. WEEE registration with ECOBULPACK or ELITEX is required before first Bulgarian market placement. Online platform sales into Bulgaria are subject to identical obligations. Failure to appoint an EU AR before first market placement is grounds for CRC product withdrawal and RAPEX notification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于没有欧盟进口商在保加利亚销售无线设备的中国制造商，欧盟授权代表是硬性法律前提。保加利亚语（西里尔字母）标签是超出欧盟范围CE标志义务的国家强制要求。在首次向保加利亚市场放置产品前，须向ECOBULPACK或ELITEX完成WEEE注册。通过网络平台向保加利亚销售受相同义务约束。在首次市场放置之前未委任EU AR，是CRC产品下架和RAPEX通报的依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於沒有歐盟進口商在保加利亞銷售無線設備的中國製造商，歐盟授權代表是硬性法律前提。保加利亞語（西里爾字母）標籤是超出歐盟範圍CE標誌義務的國家強制要求。在首次向保加利亞市場放置產品前，須向ECOBULPACK或ELITEX完成WEEE登記。通過網絡平台向保加利亞銷售受相同義務約束。在首次市場放置之前未委任EU AR，是CRC產品下架和RAPEX通報的依據。
